name: LSA Secrets Dump
description: Detects extraction of LSA secrets from registry or memory
query:
// Detect LSA secrets dumping
// Trigger on registry access to LSA secrets or known tools
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(reg\s+save.*\\sam|reg\s+save.*\\security|reg\s+save.*\\system|secretsdump|lsadump::secrets|Invoke-SecretsDump)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
